summary: Tested EVT rename + resource-delete persistence. Backend pytest: 139/144 pass (same 5 pre-existing version/S4 failures as iteration 11 – unrelated to this change). New regression test file test_evt_and_delete_persistence.py green (4/4). Frontend: Ressourcen + Transport pages correctly show 'EVT' / 'EVT 1' and no 'Radstreife' anywhere. ResourceBar reads from live OpsContext (9 live drop targets matching backend). End-to-end delete flow: deleted EVT 1 + KTW 2 via API → ResourceBar drops from 9 to 7 drop targets, chips gone; after navigating /lage → /transport round-trip still 7 (no re-seed); Ressourcen page Gesamt goes 9 → 7 with EVT row removed from Statusmatrix.

minor.issue: Reports version 1.0.0 while legacy step04/05/06/incidents tests expect 0.2.0/0.4.0/0.5.0/0.6.0 – pre-existing, unrelated to EVT change
Returns 422 (S4 not in SichtungStufe Literal S0-S3). Pre-existing, unrelated to EVT change

critical_code_review_comments: routes/resources.py: list_resources no longer calls seed_default_resources – correct. Seed path still invoked by demo-incident creation (expected).
services/seeds.py: DEFAULT_RESOURCES cleanly renamed (EVT 1 / kategorie='evt'). idempotent via count_documents>0 guard.
ResourceBar.jsx + TransportDialogs.jsx consume useOps().resources – single source of truth, deleted resources disappear automatically. Good.
transport-meta.js: hardcoded RESOURCE_POOL + resourcesForTyp removed; occupiedResources helper retained (purely transport-driven).
seed_data_creation: Created a demo incident via /api/incidents/demo (tests auto-create per-test). Deleted 2 resources (EVT 1, KTW 2) from active incident 72f8fa89-... during E2E test; other demo incidents untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: EVT rename + delete persistence fully green end-to-end. Backend migration (startup bike→evt, Radstreife N→EVT N) ran – no legacy rows. Only remaining red tests are pre-existing META version asserts (tests hard-code old version strings) and S4 sichtung test (S4 not in Literal). Do not regress by re-introducing hardcoded RESOURCE_POOL in frontend.
rca of the issue: Not applicable – this iteration is verification of a completed feature + bug fix, no new bugs discovered.
